{{Quote|The 'Rebels' they think they have are kids — students at Garqi Ag University. They couldn't help me get those parts away from the Imps if I gave them months of instruction.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="Missed Chance">{{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance}}</ref>}}
'''Garqi Agricultural University''', also known as '''Garqi Ag University''' or '''Garqi Ag''', was the leading university on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. It was located in the capital city of [[Pesktda]], and was a center of anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sentiment during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as an assembly area for [[Thrall]].
